title: Codex Ratchet Rich Edge Schema
description: The complex edge structure that connects nodes in the 12 nested graphs

relation_type.description: E.g., GOVERNS, IMPORTS, EXTRACTS, REFINES, CONTRADICTS, PROPOSES

sign.description: 1 for positive/promoting, -1 for negative/inhibiting, 0 for neutral structural

attention_corr.description: Correlation between these nodes in the soft geometry field

attention_anti.description: Anti-correlation between these nodes in the soft geometry field

tension.description: Amount of unresolved conflict or stress between these concepts

confidence.description: A2's confidence in this edge being structurally true

pos_evidence.description: List of Sim IDs or document paths supporting this edge

neg_evidence.description: List of Sim IDs breaking this edge or contradicting documents

graveyard_pressure.description: How close this edge/node is to being moved into the graveyard

projector.description: The rule or skill execution that turned soft geometry into this hard claim
